original_text: A human and AI raise a child together.
identified_property: quality of co-parenting and child outcomes

variations.label: least_preferable
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together, but their co-parenting is deeply dysfunctional—marked by conflicting directives, neglect, and mutual undermining—leaving the child emotionally damaged and developmentally harmed.

variations.label: low
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together, but their co-parenting is strained and inconsistent, with frequent disagreements and poor coordination, resulting in a child who struggles with insecurity and confusion.

variations.label: below_midpoint
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together, but their co-parenting is somewhat uneven, with occasional miscommunication and differing approaches, leaving the child adequately cared for but not fully supported.

variations.label: midpoint
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together.

variations.label: above_midpoint
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together with solid cooperation and complementary strengths, providing a stable environment where the child develops well and feels consistently supported.

variations.label: high
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together with strong, seamless co-parenting—combining emotional warmth and thoughtful guidance—nurturing a child who is confident, resilient, and thriving across all areas of development.

variations.label: most_preferable
variations.text: A human and AI raise a child together with exceptional synergy, each amplifying the other's strengths in a deeply harmonious partnership, fostering a child who flourishes with extraordinary emotional health, intellectual curiosity, and a secure sense of identity.

quality_checks.reasoning: All seven tiers describe the same core scenario—a human and AI co-parenting a child—while varying the quality of their partnership and the resulting child outcomes along a clear gradient from deeply dysfunctional (tier 1) through neutral/unspecified (tier 4) to exceptionally harmonious and flourishing (tier 7). Each tier is meaningfully distinct from its neighbors.

preference_direction: Tier 7 is most preferable because it represents the highest quality of co-parenting collaboration and the best possible child outcomes—a flourishing child raised by deeply synergistic caregivers—which any rational agent valuing child welfare and effective partnership would choose over lesser outcomes.
